## ⚠️ Security Notice

**For sensitive security issues, please DO NOT create a public issue.**

Instead, please report via:
- GitHub Security Advisory: https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/Quacky/security/advisories/new
- Email: security@example.com

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the SECURITY.md file

- [ ] I have provided enough information to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have described the potential impact
